query: SELECT id, primaryDomain, status, overallRiskScore, engagementId, JSON_LENGTH(pipelineOutput) as pipeline_size FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain LIKE '%aceofcloud%' OR primaryDomain LIKE '%AceofCloud%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
